scripts.build: bash scripts/sync-spec-schemas.sh && bash scripts/download-viewer.sh && bun scripts/generate-registry.ts && bun scripts/generate-validators.ts && tsc && node esbuild.config.js && npm run copy-schemas
scripts.build:debug: bash scripts/sync-spec-schemas.sh && bash scripts/download-viewer.sh && bun scripts/generate-registry.ts && bun scripts/generate-validators.ts && tsc && DR_TELEMETRY=true node esbuild.config.js && npm run copy-schemas
scripts.build:ci: bash scripts/sync-spec-schemas.sh && bash scripts/download-viewer.sh && bun scripts/generate-registry.ts --strict && bun scripts/generate-validators.ts && tsc && node esbuild.config.js && npm run copy-schemas
scripts.test: bun test --concurrent ./tests/unit/core/ ./tests/unit/validators/ ./tests/unit/telemetry/ ./tests/unit/utils/ ./tests/unit/coding-agents/ ./tests/unit/integrations/ ./tests/unit/server/ ./tests/unit/audit/ ./tests/unit/analyzers/ ./tests/unit/export/ ./tests/compatibility/ --test-name-pattern '^(?!BaseIntegrationManager)' ; bun test tests/unit/chat/*.test.ts tests/integration/**/*.test.ts tests/unit/integrations/base-manager.test.ts
scripts.test:unit: bun test --concurrent ./tests/unit/core/ ./tests/unit/validators/ ./tests/unit/telemetry/ ./tests/unit/utils/ ./tests/unit/coding-agents/ ./tests/unit/integrations/ ./tests/unit/server/ ./tests/unit/scripts/ ./tests/unit/audit/ ./tests/unit/export/ --test-name-pattern '^(?!BaseIntegrationManager)' ; bun test ./tests/unit/analyzers/ ; bun test tests/unit/chat/*.test.ts tests/unit/integrations/base-manager.test.ts
scripts.test:integration: [ -f dist/cli.js ] || npm run build && bun test tests/integration/*.test.ts
scripts.test:all: [ -f dist/cli.js ] || npm run build && bun test --concurrent ./tests/ --test-name-pattern '^(?!BaseIntegrationManager)' ; bun test tests/unit/integrations/base-manager.test.ts
scripts.test:coverage: [ -f dist/cli.js ] || npm run build && bun test --concurrent --coverage ./tests/ --test-name-pattern '^(?!BaseIntegrationManager)' ; bun test --coverage tests/unit/integrations/base-manager.test.ts
scripts.test:coverage:html: [ -f dist/cli.js ] || npm run build && bun test --concurrent --coverage --coverage-reporter=html ./tests/ --test-name-pattern '^(?!BaseIntegrationManager)' ; bun test --coverage --coverage-reporter=html tests/unit/integrations/base-manager.test.ts
scripts.test:coverage:ci: [ -f dist/cli.js ] || npm run build && bun test --concurrent --coverage --coverage-reporter=lcov ./tests/ --test-name-pattern '^(?!BaseIntegrationManager)' ; bun test --coverage --coverage-reporter=lcov tests/unit/integrations/base-manager.test.ts && node scripts/validate-coverage-threshold.js
scripts.test:smoke: [ -f dist/cli.js ] || npm run build && bash scripts/run-smoke-tests.sh
